The '''''B'zabuu-class transport''''' was produced by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]].
[[Toba]], a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]], owned such a vessel, named ''[[Sea Killer]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
